# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: "30"
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: '.secure_files'

stages:
  - security-scan
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy-staging
  - deploy-production

.artifact_security_template:
  before_script:
    - |
      # Verify artifact integrity and permissions
      if [ -d "artifacts" ]; then
        find artifacts -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;
        find artifacts -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
      fi
      # Prevent path traversal
      if [ -d "artifacts" ]; then
        find artifacts -name "*../*" -o -name "*..*" | while read file; do
          echo "Security: Suspicious path detected: $file"
          exit 1
        done
      fi

dependency-scan:
  stage: security-scan
  image: aquasec/trivy:latest
  script:
    - trivy fs --security-checks vuln,config --severity HIGH,CRITICAL --exit-code 1 .
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

secret-detection:
  stage: security-scan
  image: zricethezav/gitleaks:latest
  script:
    - gitleaks detect --source . --verbose --exit-code 1
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

build-application:
  stage: build
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git make
    - |
      # Generate build metadata for verification
      BUILD_HASH=$(echo "${CI_COMMIT_SHA}${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" | sha256sum | cut -d' ' -f1)
      echo "BUILD_HASH=${BUILD_HASH}" > build_metadata.env
      echo "BUILD_TIME=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> build_metadata.env
      echo "COMMIT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> build_metadata.env
      echo "PIPELINE_ID=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" >> build_metadata.env
  script:
    - mkdir -p artifacts/bin artifacts/config
    - |
      # Build with security flags
      CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build \
        -ldflags="-s -w -X main.version=${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-dev} -X main.commit=${CI_COMMIT_SHA} -buildid=" \
        -trimpath \
        -o artifacts/bin/app \
        ./cmd/app
    - |
      # Create configuration files
      cat > artifacts/config/app.yaml <<EOF
      app:
        name: "secure-app"
        version: "${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-dev}"
        environment: "staging"
        build_id: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
      security:
        tls_enabled: true
        min_tls_version: "1.3"
      EOF
    - |
      # Generate checksums for integrity verification
      cd artifacts
      find . -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > ../checksums.txt
      cd ..
      mv checksums.txt artifacts/
    - |
      # Sign artifacts (simulate signing)
      echo "${BUILD_HASH}" > artifacts/signature.txt
    - chmod -R 755 artifacts/bin
    - chmod -R 644 artifacts/config
  artifacts:
    name: "build-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - artifacts/
      - build_metadata.env
    reports:
      dotenv: build_metadata.env
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
    - merge_requests

build-docker-image:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  variables:
    DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR: "/certs"
    DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  before_script:
    - |
      # Secure Docker daemon configuration
      mkdir -p /etc/docker
      cat > /etc/docker/daemon.json <<EOF
      {
        "no-new-privileges": true,
        "userns-remap": "default"
      }
      EOF
  script:
    - mkdir -p artifacts/docker
    - |
      # Create secure Dockerfile
      cat > Dockerfile.secure <<'EOF'
      FROM alpine:3.19
      RUN apk add --no-cache ca-certificates tzdata && \
          addgroup -g 10001 -S appgroup && \
          adduser -u 10001 -S appuser -G appgroup && \
          mkdir -p /app/bin /app/config && \
          chown -R appuser:appgroup /app
      WORKDIR /app
      COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup artifacts/bin/app /app/bin/
      COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup artifacts/config/ /app/config/
      USER appuser
      EXPOSE 8080
      ENTRYPOINT ["/app/bin/app"]
      EOF
    - docker build -f Dockerfile.secure -t app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} .
    - docker save app:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} -o artifacts/docker/app-image.tar
    - sha256sum artifacts/docker/app-image.tar > artifacts/docker/image-checksum.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - artifacts/docker/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: on_success
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  only:
    - branches
    - tags

unit-tests:
  stage: test
  image: golang:1.21-alpine
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  script:
    - |
      # Verify artifact integrity
      if [ -f "artifacts/checksums.txt" ]; then
        cd artifacts
        sha256sum -c checksums.txt || exit 1
        cd ..
      fi
    - go test -v -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...
    - go tool cover -html=coverage.out -o coverage.html
  artifacts:
    name: "test-results-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
    paths:
      - coverage.html
      - coverage.out
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.out
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  coverage: '/coverage: \d+\.\d+% of statements/'
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

integration-tests:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.19
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash curl
  script:
    - |
      # Verify build metadata
      if [ ! -f "build_metadata.env" ]; then
        echo "Error: Build metadata missing"
        exit 1
      fi
      source build_metadata.env
      echo "Testing build from commit: ${COMMIT_SHA}"
    - |
      # Verify checksums
      cd artifacts
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt || exit 1
      cd ..
    - chmod +x artifacts/bin/app
    - |
      # Run integration tests in isolated environment
      timeout 30s artifacts/bin/app --version || true
      echo "Integration tests passed"
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

security-scan-artifacts:
  stage: test
  image: aquasec/trivy:latest
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  script:
    - |
      # Scan built binaries
      trivy rootfs --security-checks vuln --severity HIGH,CRITICAL artifacts/
    - |
      # Check for hardcoded secrets in artifacts
      if grep -r "password\|secret\|api_key" artifacts/config/; then
        echo "Warning: Potential secrets found in config files"
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build-application
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

package-release:
  stage: package
  image: alpine:3.19
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache tar gzip
  script:
    - |
      # Verify all artifacts before packaging
      cd artifacts
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt || exit 1
      cd ..
    - |
      # Create release package
      RELEASE_NAME="app-${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}"
      mkdir -p release/${RELEASE_NAME}
      cp -r artifacts/* release/${RELEASE_NAME}/
      cp build_metadata.env release/${RELEASE_NAME}/
    - |
      # Create installation script
      cat > release/${RELEASE_NAME}/install.sh <<'EOF'
      #!/bin/sh
      set -e
      echo "Verifying checksums..."
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt
      echo "Installing application..."
      install -m 755 bin/app /usr/local/bin/app
      mkdir -p /etc/app
      install -m 644 config/app.yaml /etc/app/
      echo "Installation complete"
      EOF
      chmod +x release/${RELEASE_NAME}/install.sh
    - |
      # Create secure tarball
      cd release
      tar czf ${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz ${RELEASE_NAME}/
      sha256sum ${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz > ${RELEASE_NAME}.tar.gz.sha256
      cd ..
  artifacts:
    name: "release-${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}"
    paths:
      - release/*.tar.gz
      - release/*.sha256
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build-application
    - unit-tests
  only:
    - tags
    - main

deploy-staging:
  stage: deploy-staging
  image: alpine:3.19
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    deployment_tier: staging
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - |
      # Setup SSH with strict security
      mkdir -p ~/.ssh
      chmod 700 ~/.ssh
      echo "${STAGING_SSH_KEY}" | base64 -d > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      ssh-keyscan -H ${STAGING_HOST} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null
  script:
    - |
      # Verify artifact integrity before deployment
      cd artifacts
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt || exit 1
      cd ..
    - |
      # Verify build metadata
      source build_metadata.env
      echo "Deploying build ${BUILD_HASH} from pipeline ${PIPELINE_ID}"
    - |
      # Secure file transfer
      rsync -avz --chmod=D755,F644 \
        --exclude='*.log' \
        --exclude='*.tmp' \
        artifacts/ ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_HOST}:/opt/app/staging/
    - |
      # Remote deployment with security checks
      ssh ${STAGING_USER}@${STAGING_HOST} << 'ENDSSH'
      set -e
      cd /opt/app/staging
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt
      chmod +x bin/app
      sudo systemctl stop app-staging || true
      sudo cp bin/app /usr/local/bin/app-staging
      sudo cp config/app.yaml /etc/app/staging.yaml
      sudo systemctl start app-staging
      sudo systemctl status app-staging
      ENDSSH
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed successfully"
  dependencies:
    - build-application
    - unit-tests
    - integration-tests
  only:
    - main
    - develop
  when: manual

deploy-production:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: alpine:3.19
  extends: .artifact_security_template
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    deployment_tier: production
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - |
      # Setup SSH with strict security
      mkdir -p ~/.ssh
      chmod 700 ~/.ssh
      echo "${PRODUCTION_SSH_KEY}" | base64 -d > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      ssh-keyscan -H ${PRODUCTION_HOST} >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null
  script:
    - |
      # Strict verification for production
      if [ ! -f "artifacts/checksums.txt" ]; then
        echo "Error: Checksums file missing"
        exit 1
      fi
      cd artifacts
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt || exit 1
      cd ..
    - |
      # Verify signature
      source build_metadata.env
      if [ -z "${BUILD_HASH}" ]; then
        echo "Error: Build hash not found"
        exit 1
      fi
      STORED_HASH=$(cat artifacts/signature.txt)
      if [ "${BUILD_HASH}" != "${STORED_HASH}" ]; then
        echo "Error: Build signature verification failed"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Download release package for production
      if [ -f "release/app-${CI_COMMIT_TAG}.tar.gz" ]; then
        cd release
        sha256sum -c app-${CI_COMMIT_TAG}.tar.gz.sha256 || exit 1
        cd ..
      fi
    - |
      # Secure deployment to production
      rsync -avz --chmod=D755,F644 \
        --checksum \
        --exclude='*.log' \
        --exclude='*.tmp' \
        artifacts/ ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_HOST}:/opt/app/production/
    - |
      # Remote production deployment with rollback capability
      ssh ${PRODUCTION_USER}@${PRODUCTION_HOST} << 'ENDSSH'
      set -e
      cd /opt/app/production
      
      # Backup current version
      if [ -f /usr/local/bin/app-production ]; then
        sudo cp /usr/local/bin/app-production /usr/local/bin/app-production.backup
      fi
      
      # Verify checksums
      sha256sum -c checksums.txt
      
      # Deploy new version
      chmod +x bin/app
      sudo cp bin/app /usr/local/bin/app-production
      sudo cp config/app.yaml /etc/app/production.yaml
      
      # Restart service
      sudo systemctl restart app-production
      sleep 5
      
      # Health check
      if ! sudo systemctl is-active --quiet app-production; then
        echo "Error: Service failed to start, rolling back"
        if [ -f /usr/local/bin/app-production.backup ]; then
          sudo cp /usr/local/bin/app-production.backup /usr/local/bin/app-production
          sudo systemctl restart app-production
        fi
        exit 1
      fi
      
      echo "Production deployment successful"
      ENDSSH
  dependencies:
    - package-release
    - security-scan-artifacts
  only:
    - tags
  when: manual
  needs:
    - job: deploy-staging
      optional: false

cleanup-old-artifacts:
  stage: deploy-production
  image: alpine:3.19
  script:
    - |
      echo "Artifacts are automatically cleaned up after ${ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS} days"
      echo "Manual cleanup can be performed via GitLab UI if needed"
  only:
    - schedules
  when: manual
